title: dolichos undulatus
intro: Dolichos undulatus, also known as Horse Gram or Kulthi bean, is a type of legume native to the tropical regions of India and Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Dolichos undulatus include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as a natural diuretic. Dolichos undulatus can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or powder, and is often used in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, to treat a range of ailments.
